description: Linear translation. Moves the weapon from start offset to end offset.

params.curve: string. Choose from: 'Linear' (smooth 0->1), 'PingPong' (0->1->0, best for stabbing/thrusts), 'EaseOut' (Fast to slow, best for heavy smashes), 'Loop' (continuous).

description: Angular rotation. Rotates the weapon from start angle to end angle.

params.curve: string. Choose from: 'Linear', 'PingPong' (best for swings/slashes that return), 'EaseOut', 'Loop' (best for spinning attacks).
